'''Reginard''' was the location of a hidden [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base called [[Reginard Base]].<ref name="AJ1">{{JournalCite|1|Chessa's Doom}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Reginard appeared in several roleplaying magazine articles published in [[Challenge (magazine)|''Challenge'']] without [[Lucas Licensing]] approval, thus rendering them non-canon.<ref name="Unlicensed">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref>

===Non-canon content===
Reginard was an uninhabited [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of forests-and-oceans in the [[Reginard system/Legends|Reginard system]]. Reginard Base was commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Halomar Corros]] and populated by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. The base was in a cliff on an island in the sea, on the opposite side of the planet from the main continent. When the Rebel base set up a passive sensor array on the main continent, it activated a hidden beacon which identified itself as a Stellar Class [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. This caused [[Hawker Bryce-Kelley]], traveling in his ship ''[[Queen's Victory]]'', to come to the planet as he was fleeing ''[[Imperial Customs Frigate 517]]''. A group of Rebels managed to convince the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ship that they had not seen the ship, however, and it soon left.
